case_title: MOUNTAIN JR., GERALD T VS CONSOLIDATED DEBRIS et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $831.52 FILED BY MOUNTAIN JR., GERALD T AS TO DEFENDANT CONSOLIDATED DEBRIS DUNN, BARRY EUGENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
